name: Hummus (Davis)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a food processor.
2. Puree the mixture until it is smooth and well combined.
3. Cover the container and refrigerate for at least an hour before serving.
Yields 4 cups. Per tablespoon: 25 calories, 1 g protein, 3 g carbohydrate, 1 g fat (0 g saturated), 0 mg cholesterol, 17 mg sodium, 1 g fiber.
